## Features

- **Parley account plan now has free monthly limits.** When you use Parley's built-in transcription and AI (instead of your own API keys), your account includes a free monthly allowance — 20 hours of transcription and a pool of AI credits, shared across meetings and voice typing. Open Settings → Usage to see how much is left and when it resets. Bringing your own API keys stays completely unlimited.
- **Voice typing caps a single dictation at 10 minutes on the Parley plan.** One hold-to-talk dictation now wraps up automatically at 10 minutes and still pastes everything transcribed so far. Using your own transcription key stays unlimited.

## Fixes

- **Clearer message when your allowance runs out.** If your monthly transcription or AI credits are used up, voice typing, Ask, and the meeting analysis now say so plainly instead of showing a raw error.
